display.purpose: Page titles, workspace names, major headings.

headline.purpose: Section titles, modal headers, card group labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, task names, item labels.

body.purpose: Descriptions, comments, form helper text. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, badge content, metadata.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, repository names, slugs, technical IDs.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default state for all cards, buttons, inputs.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Applied to cards and project items on hover, paired with 1px upward translate.

shadows.name: drag-ghost
shadows.purpose: Applied to kanban cards during drag operations.

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: Solid tinted overlay behind modals and drawers. No blur.

shadows.name: agentic-glow
shadows.purpose: Subtle purple ambient shadow for agent-assigned tasks.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid terracotta button for primary actions. Warm, confident, clearly clickable.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #CF513D; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b84330; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CF513D; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #9ca3af; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Bordered button for secondary actions. Transparent at rest, soft fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { background: transparent; color: #CF513D; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; border: 1px solid #CF513D; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: oklch(62% 0.22 27 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CF513D; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outlined:disabled { border-color: #d1d5db; color: #6b7280; background: #f3f4f6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Clean, open input field with clear focus and error states. Invitation to type.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input-container { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 40px; border: 2px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-container:focus-within { border-color: #3b82f6; } .ds-input-container.ds-input-error { border-color: #ef4444; background: #fef2f2; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 8px 10px; border: none; background: transparent; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1C1C1E; outline: none; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8E8E93; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Elevated surface for project/workspace items. Calm at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
WS
Website Redesign

Overhaul the marketing site with new brand guidelines.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E5EA; border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #CF513D; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-avatar { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: #6366F1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1C1C1E; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Kanban Task Card
components.description: Compact card for kanban board tasks. Dense but readable.
components.html:
High

Fix navigation bug on mobile

Menu doesn't collapse when tapping outside on iOS Safari.
components.css: .ds-kanban-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E5EA; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-kanban-card:hover { border-color: #CF513D; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-kanban-priority { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1); color: #ef4444; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-kanban-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; color: #1C1C1E; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-kanban-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #8E8E93; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Navigation item for the left sidebar. Recedes when inactive, warm accent when active.
components.html: Board
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-decoration: none; border-left: 3px solid transparent; transition: all 100ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { color: #1C1C1E; background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #CF513D; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-sidebar-active { color: #1C1C1E; font-weight: 600; background: oklch(62% 0.22 27 / 0.08); border-left-color: #CF513D; } .ds-sidebar-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Agentic Badge
components.description: Indicator for AI agent presence. Soft, glowing, non-intrusive.
components.css: .ds-agentic-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.06); color: #4f46e5; border: 1px solid rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.12); font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-agentic-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #22C55E; animation: ds-agentic-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-agentic-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.75); } }

narrative.overview:
Orbit is a project manager's workshop: organized, well-lit, and purposeful. Every surface exists to support the work, not decorate it. The visual system rejects cold corporate sterility and developer-tool rawness in favor of warm precision; technical capability wrapped in approachable, human-friendly design.

The interface sits in a bright, neutral space with occasional warm terracotta accents that signal action, progress, and humanity. Cards lift gently on hover, never demanding attention at rest. Typography is confident but not loud, using a single sans-serif family for cohesion across all text roles. The overall mood is one of calm competence.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutrals with a single terracotta accent used sparingly and purposefully
Flat surfaces at rest, gentle lift on interaction
Generous whitespace with consistent 8px base spacing
Rounded corners (8px–16px) that soften edges without feeling playful
Montserrat throughout, with JetBrains Mono reserved for code and technical metadata
Dark mode as a full inversion, not an afterthought

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The terracotta accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity signals importance. If a screen feels 'orange,' the accent is overused.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000000 or #FFFFFF as a background. Surface Background (#F6F6F7) is the light-mode canvas; dark mode inverts to #0B1221.

rules.name: The Sentence Case Rule
rules.body: All labels, buttons, and navigation items use sentence case. All-caps is forbidden; it feels like a developer tool or government form.

rules.name: The No Micro-Type Rule
rules.body: text-[10px] and smaller are prohibited. The minimum readable size is 0.75rem (12px). If content doesn't fit at 12px, the design has too much density, not a type problem.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not cast shadows at rest. If a card has a shadow without being hovered, focused, or dragged, the shadow is too heavy.

rules.name: The No Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: Never use backdrop-filter: blur() for overlays. Use solid tinted backgrounds (bg-surface-900/50) to maintain clarity and avoid performance issues.

dos: Do use sentence case for all labels, buttons, and navigation. No exceptions outside sidebar group headers.
Do keep body text at 0.875rem (14px) minimum and labels at 0.75rem (12px) minimum. No micro-typography.
Do use the terracotta accent sparingly: primary actions, active states, hover borders, and subtle ambient glows only.
Do ensure dark mode inverts the surface scale fully. Test every new component in both themes.
Do use surface-50 for page backgrounds and white for elevated surfaces in light mode.
Do apply hover states to interactive cards: border-color shift to accent + shadow-lg + 1px translate-up.
Do use semantic colors consistently: blue for progress/info, green for done, purple for agentic, red for errors, amber for warnings.
Do provide keyboard focus rings (focus-visible) for all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use all-caps text. It reads as shouting or developer-tool aesthetic.
Don't use text-[10px], text-[11px], or any size below 0.75rem. If it doesn't fit, redesign the layout.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) for modal overlays or decorative cards. Use solid tinted overlays.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent) on cards, list items, or alerts. The sidebar active state is the only exception.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip text. Use solid colors and weight/size for emphasis.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent). Orbit is not a SaaS dashboard cliché.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Vary card structure by content type.
Don't default to modals for every secondary action. Exhaust inline, progressive, and drawer alternatives first.
Don't use #000000 or #FFFFFF as backgrounds. Always use surface-50 or surface-bg.
Don't create nested cards (a card inside a card). One level of elevation is enough.
